mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.name, g.description, COUNT(CASE WHEN gm.is_delete = 'F0' THEN gm.user_id END) AS member_cnt FROM groups g LEFT OUTER JOIN group_member gm ON g.id = gm.group_id AND gm.is_delete = 'F0'
g.is_delete = 'F0'
AND g.name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.description ORDER BY g.name
mapper.insert: { CALL PROC_CREATE_GROUP( #{name, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userIds, mode=IN, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=USER_ID_TAB, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.ArrayTypeHandler}, #{projects, mode=IN, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=PROJECT_TAB, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.ProjectArrayTypeHandler}) }
mapper.update: { CALL PROC_UPDATE_GROUP( #{id, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userIds, mode=IN, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=USER_ID_TAB, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.ArrayTypeHandler}, #{projects, mode=IN, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=PROJECT_TAB, typeHandler=com.beez.beez.config.OracleTypeHandler.ProjectArrayTypeHandler}) }
